name: Lemony Drumsticks with Stuffing
recipeIngredient: 1 medium Lemon (grated rind for 1 lemon, juice from half)
recipeInstructions:
1. Grate the rind from half a lemon; set aside.
2. Cut the remaining half of the lemon into thin slices and squeeze the juice from it.
3. Heat oil in a large skillet and brown the drumsticks.
4. Place the drumsticks in a shallow baking dish, topping with brown sugar and lemon slices.
5. Bake at 375 degrees for 15 minutes.
6. In the same skillet, combine hot water, butter, and cornbread stuffing mix contents, stirring until butter is melted.
7. Add stuffing crumbs, lemon juice, and grated lemon rind, then stir just to moisten.
8. Move the drumsticks to one side of the dish; baste with pan drippings.
9. Mound the stuffing on the other side and bake for an additional 15 minutes.
10. Makes 3 cups stuffing plus chicken or 6 servings.
